name: AgentBOX-MeetingProposals
description: Meeting-Notes → Proposals agent. Polls new Gemini meeting-note next-steps from the sidecar candidates feed (via the agent-dispatch proxy), classifies each on the local model (qwen3) as proposal / not-proposal, and dispatches proposal-type steps to the `proposals` hermes profile (tenant agent:proposals) which auto-drafts a versioned proposal. See agentbox-sidecar docs/meeting-proposals-agent.prd.v0.1.0.md.
